---
format: 
  pdf: 
    pdf-engine: xelatex
    keep-tex: false
    documentclass: article
    geometry:
      - top=10mm
      - left=15mm
      - right=15mm
      - bottom=5mm
      - heightrounded
    fontfamily: libertine
    colorlinks: true
    fontsize: '18'
    include-in-header: 
      text: |
        \usepackage{multicol}
        \usepackage{lipsum}
        \usepackage{hyperref}
        \usepackage{libertine}
        \usepackage{fancyhdr}
        \usepackage{lastpage}
        \setlength{\multicolsep}{2pt plus 1.0pt minus 0.75pt}
        \setlength{\columnsep}{3em}
        \usepackage{enumitem}
        \setlist{nolistsep}
        \setlength{\columnsep}{-2.8cm}
        \fancyhf{}
        \renewcommand{\headrulewidth}{0pt}
        \fancyfoot[C]{\thepage/\pageref{LastPage}}
        \AtBeginDocument{\pagestyle{fancy}}
---

<!-- TITLE -->
\begin{huge}\begin{center}{\bf SIMONE ROMITI}\end{center}\end{huge}

<!-- CONTACT INFO -->
\begin{center}
simone.romiti.1994@gmail.com |
\href{https://simone-romiti.github.io/}{Website} | 
\href{https://github.com/simone-romiti}{GitHub} | 
\href{https://www.linkedin.com/in/simone-romiti/}{LinkedIn} |
\href{https://orcid.org/0000-0002-6509-447X}{ORCID}
\end{center}
\vspace{15pt}

\hrule

\begin{large}

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis

from datetime import date
years = (date.today() - date(2018, 3, 1)).days // 365

print(f"""

I am a computational scientist and ML developer with {years}+ years of experience building high-performance
simulation, inference, and data analysis systems. 
My core expertise is in Monte Carlo methods, Bayesian
statistics, deep learning, and large-scale HPC pipelines on multi-terabyte datasets.
I have a proven track record of open-source software with CI/CD, automated testing,
and versioned releases. 
Comfortable translating technical complexity for diverse audiences;
experienced leading international projects and cross-functional teams.

Resident in Switzerland with B permit.
\\\\
Outside the lab: skier, hiker, and karaoke enthusiast.

""")

```



\end{large}

\vspace{9pt}

<!-- SKILLS -->
\begin{large}{\bf TECHNICAL SKILLS}
  \vspace{9pt}
  \hrule
  \vspace{9pt}
\end{large}
\vspace{-0.15cm}

\begin{large}

\textbf{Languages} - C/C++, Python, R, Bash/GNU Linux

\vspace{-0.15cm}
\textbf{ML \& Statistics} - PyTorch, Physics-Informed Neural Networks (PINNs), VAEs, Diffusion Models, Bayesian Inference, Monte Carlo, Nested Sampling

\vspace{-0.15cm}
\textbf{Data \& Scientific Python} - NumPy, SciPy, Pandas, Matplotlib, Plotly, Streamlit, SymPy, Jupyter

\vspace{-0.15cm}
\textbf{HPC \& Systems} - CUDA, MPI, OpenMP, SLURM, EasyBuild

\vspace{-0.15cm}
\textbf{DevOps \& Tools} - Git, GitHub Actions, CI/CD, Docker, LaTeX, Quarto

\vspace{-0.15cm}
\textbf{Spoken Languages} - Italian (native), English (proficient), German (basic)

\end{large}

\vspace{9pt}

<!-- EXPERIENCE -->
\begin{large}{\bf WORK EXPERIENCE}
  \vspace{9pt}
  \hrule
  \vspace{9pt}

  \begin{multicols}{2}
    \begin{flushleft}{\bf \href{https://www.unibe.ch/index_eng.html}{University of Bern}}\end{flushleft}
    \begin{flushright}Apr 2024 -- Present\end{flushright}
  \end{multicols}
  \vspace{-0.15cm}
  \begin{multicols}{2}
    \begin{flushleft}\textit{Postdoctoral Researcher}\end{flushleft}
    \begin{flushright}Bern, Switzerland\end{flushright}
  \end{multicols}
\end{large}

\vspace{-0.09cm}

\begin{large}
  \begin{itemize}
    \item \textbf{Reduced algorithm complexity from $O(N^6)$ to $O(N \log N)$} for a class of high-dimensional integrals via parallelized Fast Fourier Transforms — directly cutting HPC compute costs.
    \item \textbf{Built end-to-end Bayesian inference pipeline} over multi-terabyte datasets: full uncertainty quantification, systematic error budget, and model averaging; published with open-source implementation.
    \item \textbf{Applied Physics-Informed Neural Networks (PINNs)} to solve differential equations, extending the method to a new problem class; results published in a peer-reviewed journal.
    \item \textbf{Implemented Nested Sampling algorithm} for multi-modal density estimation and phase-transition detection.
    \item \textbf{Shipped production open-source simulation libraries}: versioned releases, CI/CD pipelines, automated test suites, and documentation — 240,000 GPU node-hours compute grant (CSCS ALPS, 2025) as PI.
    \item \textbf{Mentored 3 PhD students} on software engineering practices, numerical methods, and project delivery.
  \end{itemize}
\end{large}

\vspace{9pt}

\begin{large}
  \begin{multicols}{2}
    \begin{flushleft}{\bf \href{https://www.uni-bonn.de/en/home?set_language=en}{University of Bonn}}\end{flushleft}
    \begin{flushright}Nov 2021 -- Mar 2024\end{flushright}
  \end{multicols}
  \vspace{-0.15cm}
  \begin{multicols}{2}
    \begin{flushleft}\textit{Postdoctoral Researcher}\end{flushleft}
    \begin{flushright}Bonn, Germany\end{flushright}
  \end{multicols}
\end{large}

\vspace{-0.09cm}

\begin{large}
  \begin{itemize}
    \item \textbf{Designed and operated large-scale Monte Carlo simulation pipelines} on international HPC clusters: tuning, statistical validation, and quality control of multi-terabyte datasets.
    \item \textbf{Developed a novel numerical method} achieving machine-precision accuracy for a class of constrained optimization problems; published in a peer-reviewed journal.
    \item \textbf{Prototyped hybrid Monte Carlo + Quantum Computing pipeline} for combinatorial sampling problems.
    \item \textbf{Mentored 3 graduate students} and delivered tutorial sessions for undergraduate courses.
  \end{itemize}
\end{large}

\vspace{9pt}

<!-- EDUCATION -->
\begin{large}{\bf EDUCATION}
  \vspace{9pt}
  \hrule
  \vspace{9pt}

  \begin{multicols}{2}
    \begin{flushleft}{\href{https://www.uniroma3.it/}{\textit{Roma Tre University}}}\end{flushleft}
    \begin{flushright}Rome, Italy\end{flushright}
  \end{multicols}
  \vspace{-0.15cm}
  \begin{multicols}{2}
    \begin{flushleft}
    \textbf{PhD in Physics} (defended April 2022) 
    \end{flushleft}
    \begin{flushright}Nov. 2018 -- Oct. 2021\end{flushright}
  \end{multicols}
  \vspace{-0.2cm}
  \begin{itemize}
    \item Specialization: Monte Carlo simulation on HPC machines, large-scale statistical data analysis
    \item Ranked 1st in national admission exam
  \end{itemize}

  \begin{multicols}{2}
    \begin{flushleft}{\href{https://www.uniroma3.it/}{\textit{Roma Tre University}}}\end{flushleft}
    \begin{flushright}Rome, Italy\end{flushright}
  \end{multicols}
  \vspace{-0.15cm}
  \begin{multicols}{2}
    \begin{flushleft}
    \textbf{M.S.\ in Physics}
    \end{flushleft}
    \begin{flushright}Oct. 2016 -- Oct. 2018\end{flushright}
  \end{multicols}
  \vspace{-0.2cm}
  \begin{itemize}
    \item Grade: 110/110 cum laude | GPA: 29.85/30
  \end{itemize}

  \begin{multicols}{2}
    \begin{flushleft}{\href{https://www.uniroma3.it/}{\textit{Roma Tre University}}}\end{flushleft}
    \begin{flushright}Rome, Italy\end{flushright}
  \end{multicols}
  \vspace{-0.15cm}
  \begin{multicols}{2}
    \begin{flushleft}
    \textbf{B.S.\ in Physics}
    \end{flushleft}
    \begin{flushright}Oct. 2013 -- Jul. 2016\end{flushright}
  \end{multicols}
  \vspace{-0.2cm}
  \begin{itemize}
    \item Grade: 110/110 cum laude | GPA: 28.84/30 | Merit Scholarship recipient
  \end{itemize}

\end{large}

\vspace{9pt}

<!-- LEADERSHIP -->
\begin{large}
{\bf LEADERSHIP \& ACHIEVEMENTS}
  \vspace{9pt}
  \hrule
  \vspace{9pt}

\setlength{\columnsep}{-4.5cm}

  \begin{multicols}{2}
    \begin{flushleft}    
      \textbf{Invited Speaker} -- Technical seminars at CERN and ECT*
    \end{flushleft}
    \begin{flushright}2025 -- 2026\end{flushright}
  \end{multicols}

  \vspace{-0.15cm}

  \begin{multicols}{2}
    \begin{flushleft}    
      \textbf{Workshop Organizer} -- International HPC \& Quantum Computing workshop (30+ attendees)
    \end{flushleft}
    \begin{flushright}\href{https://www.ectstar.eu/}{ECT*} | 2025\end{flushright}
  \end{multicols}

  \vspace{-0.15cm}

  \begin{multicols}{2}
    \begin{flushleft}
      \textbf{Visiting Grant} -- Networking funds from University of Bern
    \end{flushleft}
    \begin{flushright}\href{https://www.tuwien.at/}{TU Wien} | 2026\end{flushright}
  \end{multicols}


\end{large}
